emiratesid.ae.sm.client
Class SecureMessagingClient

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.sm.client.SecureMessagingClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
SecureMessagingInterface
public class SecureMessagingClient
extends java.lang.Object
implements SecureMessagingInterface

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
Secure Messaging Client that perform Secure Messaging operations remotely

1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI
